feed.title: Fee Selection for CTV-Based Mining Pool Fanouts

entry.title: Fee Selection for CTV-Based Mining Pool Fanouts
entry.summary: The recent acknowledgment highlights the significant contributions and years of dedication from core developers and maintainers who have played a crucial role in achieving critical milestones within the project. This gesture serves as a tribute to those who have contributed tirelessly but are no longer part of the team. Their efforts, while they were active members, have left a lasting impact that continues to be felt even after their departure. The symbolic reference to "pouring liquid" suggests a moment of remembrance and respect for these past contributors, emphasizing their unforgettable influence on the project's progression.
